bonuses.stat: Gain Minor Aegis at all times, reducing your damage taken from Dungeon, Trial, and Arena Monsters by 5%.

While bracing you create a distortion barrier around yourself after 2 seconds. After the delay, every 2 seconds you gain 14-614 Armor and enemies within the distortion barrier have their Armor reduced by 42-1843 for 5 seconds. These effects stack up to 3 times.
